description_wiki: Yugoslavia (; lit. 'Land of the South Slavs') was a country in Central Europe and the Balkans that existed from 1918 to 1992.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

aliases: World Relief Corporation of National Association of Evangelicals
World Relief Corp of National Association of Evangelicals
description: an international relief and development agency
description_wiki: World Relief (officially World Relief Corporation of National Association of Evangelicals) is a global Christian humanitarian organization.

entity: United Nations International Children's Emergency Fund

description: religion widely practiced in the Indian subcontinent
description_wiki: Hinduism () is an umbrella term for a range of Indian religious and spiritual traditions (sampradayas) that are unified by adherence to the concept of dharma, a cosmic order maintained by its followers through rituals and righteous living, as expounded in the Vedas.

description: holiday celebrated in the United States on the fourth Thursday in November
description_wiki: Thanksgiving is a federal holiday in the United States celebrated on the fourth Thursday of November (which became the uniform date country-wide in 1941).
